column29: Humble yourselves.  Remember when you were coming up in your career.  Respect your associates and appreciate all that they do to try and keep up with your ever changing orders.  Stop treating people like numbers.
column32: Salary was good for the position, but only because they never promoted anyone.
column33: Relentless pressure from the top.  Constantly changing direction.  Senior management is easily sold on every shiny new toy, rather than strengthening existing infrastructure.
